wave0Scope: source-map/test-inventory/release-surface gate only; no runtime code edits
explicitNoPatchRule: Do not manually patch bundled/generated/hashed dist artifacts; source and tests only until accepted source build generates release outputs.

globalBaselineCommands.purpose: confirm dirty baseline and that Wave 0 edits are docs/report only
JSON validation for inventory and primary report

globalPostWaveCommands.purpose: source build before release artifact generation; run only after later source/test waves are accepted
full diff whitespace validation before PR/release readiness
changed-file validation after implementation; acceptable substitute for broad check when scoped

newTestsRequired: latestRawText fallback containing TypeScript/Python source is classified/quarantined and not parent-visible raw text
partial-progress and timeout fallback produce metadata-only non-success summaries
silent reply and ANNOUNCE_SKIP remain control metadata without raw body
descendant frozenResultText aggregation calls normalized parent-visible builder for each child

baselineCommands.command: OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-output.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.capture-completion-reply.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.timeout.test.ts

postWaveCommands.command: OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-output.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.capture-completion-reply.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.timeout.test.ts

surfaces.surface: raw child-result wrapping, parser, quarantine, and acceptance evidence
newTestsRequired: valid strict JSON verdict, fenced JSON, prose+JSON, invalid/truncated JSON, invalid enum, and missing fields
legacy plaintext PASS maps to UNVERIFIED/non-success unless parent/runtime evidence upgrades it
raw source/diff/log/grep, binary/null/ANSI/unicode noise, and internal envelopes are quarantined
schema-valid PASS with no/nonexistent/stale/out-of-scope/path-traversal evidence becomes EVIDENCE_UNVERIFIED
valid FAIL propagates as non-success even with partial output

surfaces.surface: subagent announce flow and direct/queued/fallback delivery
newTestsRequired: direct and queued announce paths behave consistently for raw source/diff/log/empty outputs
fallback captured output is normalized before internal event or external delivery
cron/background announce flow preserves provenance but no raw body
nested subagent handoff receives metadata-only event
agent-mediated message-tool delivery cannot re-emit raw child result

baselineCommands.command: OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-dispatch.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.format.e2e.test.ts
OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/server.agent.subagent-delivery-context.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts

postWaveCommands.command: OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-dispatch.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.format.e2e.test.ts
OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/server.agent.subagent-delivery-context.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts

surfaces.surface: internal event formatting and prompt reconstruction
newTestsRequired: task completion event with rawBodySuppressed formats only status-card and child-result summary metadata

delivery-state/action vocabulary including MALFORMED_QUARANTINED, UNVERIFIED, EVIDENCE_UNVERIFIED, NOT_ACCEPTANCE_EVIDENCE, DUPLICATE_ANNOUNCE_SUPPRESSED, INFRA_BLOCKED renders as non-success metadata
plain prompt and runtime-context prompt both suppress raw bodies
resolveInternalEventTranscriptBody strips internal envelope before transcript persistence
delimiter escaping prevents injected INTERNAL_RUNTIME_CONTEXT_BEGIN/END from leaking
legacy BEGIN_UNTRUSTED_CHILD_RESULT/END_UNTRUSTED_CHILD_RESULT is stripped by runtime-context sanitizer

baselineCommands.command: OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/agents/internal-events.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts

postWaveCommands.command: OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/agents/internal-events.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts
postWaveCommands.purpose: prompt reconstruction and transcript persistence regression

newTestsRequired: same childRunId/childSessionKey/payloadHash suppresses duplicate parent-visible completion
duplicate completion quarantines/suppresses raw second body
registry resume preserves dedupe counters and delivered state
DUPLICATE_ANNOUNCE_SUPPRESSED is visible as metadata/status only

baselineCommands.command: OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/agents/subagent-registry-completion.test.ts src/agents/subagent-registry.announce-loop-guard.test.ts src/agents/subagent-registry.persistence.resume.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.test.ts src/agents/subagent-child-result-contract.test.ts

postWaveCommands.command: OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/agents/subagent-registry-completion.test.ts src/agents/subagent-registry.announce-loop-guard.test.ts src/agents/subagent-registry.persistence.resume.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.test.ts src/agents/subagent-child-result-contract.test.ts

newTestsRequired: marked BEGIN_UNTRUSTED_CHILD_RESULT/END_UNTRUSTED_CHILD_RESULT blocks removed from summaries
missing/nested/split/escaped markers and code-fence markers sanitize deterministically
raw source/diff/log without markers never reaches summarizer/provider/LLM
preserved turns, split-turn context, provider path, LLM path, and successor transcript retain metadata only
sanitizer is idempotent and does not remove ordinary user content unless classified unsafe child result

baselineCommands.command: OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/agents/compaction.test.ts src/agents/compaction.tool-result-details.test.ts src/agents/compaction.identifier-preservation.test.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/compaction-successor-transcript.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts

surfaces.surface: memory extraction and session export sanitation
newTestsRequired: polluted transcript export strips internal runtime context and child raw bodies
memory search/index snippets include metadata/hash only, not raw source/diff/log
legacy markers and inter-session subagent announce prompts are sanitized before memory extraction
large/raw artifact bodies are not embedded or written to memory host outputs

baselineCommands.command: OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/session-files.test.ts packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/session-files-yield.test.ts packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/read-file.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.memory.test.ts src/agents/memory-search.test.ts

newTestsRequired: subagent_announce inter-session user prompt hidden from displayed history
live assistant projection strips internal runtime context from text/delta
malformed/quarantined completion status card renders collapsed metadata only
downgraded PASS/UNVERIFIED/EVIDENCE_UNVERIFIED not rendered as green success
raw-open workflow requires explicit operator action and never previews body by default

OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-ui.config.ts ui/src/ui/chat/message-extract.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts

surfaces.deferRationale: UI/status raw-open details are Wave 6 after metadata-only runtime path exists; display projection is mapped and must be tested before rollout.
surfaces.priorityNote: Mapped completely for Wave 0; UI raw-open/status rollout remains Wave 6, but display projection is included in P0 leak-prevention regression coverage.

newTestsRequired: only VERIFIED_PASS can satisfy acceptance gate; PASS and SCHEMA_VALID remain advisory
checker/mediator acceptance cannot be child chat self-attestation
parent/runtime-observed artifact/log/session/commit/scope evidence required
restart/resume revalidates cached decisions and downgrades stale evidence
concurrent child completions cannot cross-contaminate evidence or status

baselineCommands.command: OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/agents/subagent-child-result-contract.test.ts src/agents/subagent-active-task-contract.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts
OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/protocol/schema/agent.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts

OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/protocol/schema/agent.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts

focusedCommandPolicy: Use focused vitest commands above for baseline/post-wave gates. Avoid broad pnpm check, broad tsc, broad tsgo during Wave 0; later release readiness may add broader gates only after source changes are complete.
